description: Dataset coverage contract for DirectorBundle artifacts built from monthly Salesforce source bundles. A dataset is either source-backed today or explicitly optional-empty until a source requirement is added.

datasets.rationale: APAC pilot is now backed by a dedicated monthly Opportunity list view with unweighted ARR and Probability. Other territories must add equivalent source IDs before full-run promotion.
Legacy SOQL-backed closed-deal dataset. Add a monthly source requirement before using it for publish claims.
Renewal detail is not part of the current report-first source contract.
Approval detail is not part of the current report-first source contract.
Current-quarter Pipeline Inspection list view is the canonical monthly pipeline display source.
Forward-quarter Pipeline Inspection list view supports fallback when current-quarter active pipeline is empty.
Activity signals remain a legacy SOQL enrichment until a source-backed requirement lands.
Commit items are not part of the current monthly report-first source contract.
Field-history stage events are not source-backed by the current specified reports.
Field-history forecast-category events are not source-backed by the current specified reports.
Field-history close-date events are not source-backed by the current specified reports.
Prior-quarter movement logic should be rebuilt from historical-trending/field-history requirements before use.
Current-quarter movement logic should be rebuilt from historical-trending/field-history requirements before use.
Historical Trending reports are the canonical source for snapshot movement inputs.
